_instruction: List your publications here. Paste your raw BibTeX string into the 'bibtex' field. 'type' can be 'journal', 'conference', or 'review' for filtering. Ensure icons use Tabler class names (e.g. 'ti-external-link').

items.title: Digital holographic microscopy for 3D morphometry of biological samples
items.impact: Demonstrates sub-micron axial resolution for label-free biological imaging using DHM.

items.title: RIS-assisted underwater optical wireless communication: channel models and open challenges
items.impact: Comprehensive survey of RIS-enabled UWOC systems with channel model comparisons and research gaps.

items.title: 5G lab-validated holographic buoy system for coastal water quality monitoring
items.impact: First lab-validated prototype integrating 5G connectivity with holographic sensing for marine monitoring.
